lastReleaseMessage: chore: gitignore logs/ (watchdog heartbeat + relaunch log are operational state)

barRaise.topFinding: Fourth review's one open item is resolved same-day: README.md was brought from its stale "Pre-1.0 / June-15 turn-on checklist" framing to v1.0.0 reality (f4a0195), and added to version_pill_locations so it can't drift again. The two LOW residuals the reviews kept re-flagging (process-existence tunnel signal, per-boot session secret) are now recorded as accepted design in D-010 (ab89fab) rather than carried as open work, per the standing decision not to fix them. Operational system stays green: clean tree, fresh heartbeat, key stripped and model pinned on every spawn. No open items.
